title: Better Librarian
description: Upgrades Librarian villagers to sell all essential enchanted books needed for SMPs and survival playthroughs, removing the grind of rerolling trades.
body:
# BetterLibrarian

**BetterLibrarian** enhances Librarian villagers by overhauling their enchanted book trades, ensuring players have consistent access to essential enchantments for SMP servers or survival playthroughs.

---

## Features

### Custom Enchanted Book Pool
Librarians can now offer a curated set of powerful and essential enchanted books:

- Protection IV  
- Unbreaking III  
- Mending  
- Depth Strider III  
- Sharpness V  
- Sweeping Edge III  
- Efficiency III  
- Silk Touch  
- Fortune III  
- Feather Falling IV  
- Respiration III  
- Aqua Affinity  
- Swift Sneak III  

These replace the random enchanted book trades normally generated by vanilla villagers.

---

### Automatic Trade Injection

When a player interacts with a Librarian:

- All custom enchanted books are automatically added to the villager’s trades.
- Emerald prices are randomized between **10–59 emeralds**.
- Existing vanilla trades remain untouched.
